pinkStart.txt: WOOHOO! Finally getting out of this crazy planet!

start.txt: This looks pretty bad. Good thing you found me, anyone else would have blown you up trying to fix this.

sarcasm.txt: Yes, Yes, You're amazing. Now can you please fix my ship?

gratitude.txt: Thank you so much for helping us out, we really appreciate it.

Mechanic_response1.txt: Damn right I am, now stand back before your ship blows up again.

Mechanic_response2.txt: Take your thanks somewhere else, I just want to go back to my house and sleep.

player_response.txt: Thank you so much, How can I ever repay you?

Mechanic_1.txt: You can pay me back by getting out of my hair. I'm already annoyed enough as is.

Mechanic2.txt: Turns out the 'devil' I was hiding from was just a pet that got loose.

Mechanic3.txt: I think most people went to go look for him, but they're crazy. There's no way that huge spinning thing in the sky is just some pet.

player_response2.txt: I suggest staying away from CryptTown then...

anyways.txt: Anyways, thanks again for fixing my ship. I should get going now.
